channel.title: Sorting, Stacking & Plugging Toys on LEGO barato - Cheap - Angebote - Cadeaux

item.title: LEGO 10974 DUPLO Wild Animals of Asia Bricks Set with Panda & Elephant Baby Animal Toy Figures plus Sounds Toys for Toddlers Girls & Boys Age 2-5
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO 10974 DUPLO Wild Animals of Asia Bricks Set with Panda & Elephant Baby Animal Toy Figures plus Sounds Toys for Toddlers Girls & Boys Age 2-5 here: ℹ️: This educational toy for toddlers and kids age 2-5 includes 11 animal figures and realistic sounds, so kids can explore Asian wildlife LEGO DUPLO set features adult and baby elephant, tiger and panda animal toys, 2 red pandas, a monkey, 2 birds plus bamboo and cherry blossom trees Treat a little explorer to other LEGO DUPLO animal sets: Wild Animals of South America (10973) and Wild Animals of Africa (10971) Includes a foldable, 3-dimensional playmat and a sound brick that plays realistic noises and animal sounds for interactive adventure playtime Kids can place the pandas in the trees, play with the animal toys on the slide, swing the monkey on the vine and take a walk with the elephants LEGO DUPLO early development and activity toys for toddlers make fab birthday or Christmas gifts for boys and girls aged 2 plus years old This fun packed animal toy building set with LEGO DUPLO Bricks helps to develop kids language, social, cognitive and fine motor skills 🛒 Buy it now!
